Container.Name: UYTDownloader
Container.Overview:
Self-hosted YouTube download orchestration tool built around yt-dlp, ffmpeg, and SponsorBlock.
Features: - Probe videos, playlists, and channels before downloading - Video + Audio, Audio Only, or Video Only with quality/format/bitrate selection - SponsorBlock integration (keep, mark chapters, or remove) - Channel/playlist subscriptions with auto-download and filters - Merge multiple videos into compilations with chapter markers - Library with bulk download, zip export, and file management - Storage management with retention policies and disk space guard - GPU acceleration (NVIDIA NVENC auto-detected) - Real-time download progress tracking
NOTE: This is a Docker Compose application with 6 services (postgres, redis, backend, worker, beat, frontend). Use the Docker Compose Manager plugin to deploy, or deploy each service individually.
Container.Description: YouTube download orchestration with web UI. Probe before download, SponsorBlock removal, playlist subscriptions, compilation builder, GPU acceleration, and library management.

Config.Name: PUID
Config.Description: User ID for file permissions (99 = nobody on Unraid)

Config.Name: PGID
Config.Description: Group ID for file permissions (100 = users on Unraid)

Config.Name: Concurrency Mode
Config.Description: Download concurrency: safe (1 job), balanced (3 jobs), power (6 jobs)

Config.Name: SponsorBlock Default
Config.Description: Default SponsorBlock action: keep, mark_chapters, remove

Config.Name: Disk Guard %
Config.Description: Auto-cleanup when free disk space drops below this percentage

Config.Name: Disk Guard Strategy
Config.Description: Cleanup order: oldest_first, newest_first, largest_first, smallest_first

Config.Name: NVIDIA GPU
Config.Description: Set to 'all' to enable NVIDIA GPU acceleration (requires nvidia-driver plugin)
